Design Feature

Description
Redesign the hero section of the homepage for Acme Corporation's website redesign project. Update heading hierarchy, color scheme, and call-to-action buttons to match new branding guidelines. Coordinate with the design team on motion choices and confirm with the client before merging.
Checklist2 of 5 · 40%
Research competitor hero sections NT
Create initial sketches SC
Finalize color palette JC
Update CSS and animations SC
Get client feedback
Created Mar 1, 2026 · Updated 2 days ago
JC
Joshua Castilla
I think we should use a more prominent gradient. The current design feels flat.
Mar 4, 2:15 PM 👍 2
SC
Sarah Chen You
@Joshua Thanks for the feedback! I'll explore gradient options today.
Mar 4, 3:30 PM 👍 1
JC
Joshua Castilla
@Sarah Perfect — aim for something that feels warm but still brand-compliant.
Mar 4, 4:02 PM
NT
Nikko Trinidad You
@Joshua Agreed. Let's also warm up the CTA color while we're at it.
Mar 4, 4:10 PM
SC
Sarah Chen You
Just pushed the updated hero component to the dev branch. Ready for review!

Nikko Trinidad You
Looks great! I'll schedule client review for tomorrow afternoon.
